Patch Set 2:

I think the patch looks good, but there are three things that I see in the test results (suite_log), but I can’t reproduce them manually testing this patch in VMs.

In all the test results, we are still seeing the issue with lustre_version_code(). In the suite_log for all three test sessions, we see several cases of

trevis-66vm1: /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 408: ( << 16) | ( << 8) | : syntax error: operand expected (error token is "<< 16) | ( << 8) | ")
trevis-66vm1: /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 408: ( << 16) | ( << 8) | : syntax error: operand expected (error token is "<< 16) | ( << 8) | ")

When I test this patch manually, I don’t see these errors.

Although the Lustre version is clearly greater than 2.10.55, the layouts tested are only raid0 and pfl, not flr. Again in all three test session suite_logs we see
layout: raid0 raid0 pfl pfl pfl

When I test this manually, I do see “flr flr flr” in the layout list.

Also, in the review-ldiskfs, I see the following in the suite_log:
  Trace dump:
  = ./file_create.sh:1:main()
: FAIL: test-framework exiting on error

I don't see anything wrong with this patch, but I don't think it fixes the error in the ticket.
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 2:

James, I think the errors you saw are related to the FLR version checks that were added to the file_create.sh script.  I've updated the script to fix the FLR version check similarly.

parents.subject: LU-11115 lod: skip max_create_count=0 OST in QoS and RR algorithms

commit.subject: LU-10254 tests: fix racer version checks
commit.message:
LU-10254 tests: fix racer version checks

Fix the checks for enabling DOM, PFL, and FLR tests in file_create.sh.
The $LCTL variable was unset in the test script, so the version check
was failing.

Instead of doing the version check inside file_create.sh do it in the
Lustre-specific racer.sh test script, where other version checks live.
This enables PFL and FLR testing by default, but leaves DOM tests off.

Author: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=racer envdefinitions=SLOW=yes
Test-Parameters: testlist=racer mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2aeab0911f19f9741212925cf9b4aeb70e3ebbe5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/30307
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Mike Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
